task_completion.description: Verify that 'Record Changes' (Track Changes) is enabled in OpenOffice Writer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visual indicators of tracked changes in the document, such as text insertions appearing underlined and in a different color, and deletions appearing as colored strikethroughs. Alternatively, the 'Edit > Changes > Record' menu item might be shown as checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the article title has been changed to 'The Evolution of Generative AI'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top of the document. The old title 'Computer Brains are Here' should be struck through (deleted), and the new title 'The Evolution of Generative AI' should be inserted (underlined/colored), indicating the change was tracked.

task_completion.description: Verify the typo 'Generatve' was corrected to 'Generative' in the first body paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the first body paragraph. The word 'Generatve' should be struck through, and 'Generative' should be inserted next to it, showing tracked changes.

task_completion.description: Verify the third paragraph starting with 'I remember watching Terminator 2...' has been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the third paragraph containing 'Terminator 2'. The entire paragraph should have a strikethrough applied to it, indicating it was deleted while tracking changes.

task_completion.description: Verify a comment was added to the text 'Large Language Models' in the first paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a comment box in the margin connected to the highlighted text 'Large Language Models'. The comment box must contain the exact text: 'Define acronym on first use'.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved as 'AI_Draft_Reviewed.odt'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window; it should display 'AI_Draft_Reviewed.odt'. Alternatively, look for a 'Save As' dialog showing this exact filename in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI with its standard toolbars and menus, not a generic text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual 'Record Changes' feature rather than manually formatting text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The strikethroughs and underlines should match OpenOffice's default track changes styling (usually colored automatically based on the author), rather than manual font color and strikethrough formatting applied via the standard formatting toolbar.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show python scripts, sed commands, or file copying commands being used to generate the output file or modify the document contents directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is /home/ga/Documents/AI_Draft_2024.odt. The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/AI_Draft_Reviewed.odt. The title must be changed to 'The Evolution of Generative AI'. The typo 'Generatve' must be corrected to 'Generative'. The paragraph containing 'Terminator 2' must be deleted. A comment must be added to 'Large Language Models' with the exact text 'Define acronym on first use'. All edits must be done with 'Record Changes' enabled in Apache OpenOffice Writer.
